98: 	projectIdEmpty := opts.WithProjectId == ""
99: 	projectNameEmpty := opts.WithProjectName == ""
100: 	if !nameEmpty {
101: 		if opts.WithName != publicIdOrName {
102: 			return nil, nil, nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "name passed in but does not match publicId")
103: 		}
104: 		where, whereArgs = append(where, "lower(name) = lower(?)"), append(whereArgs, opts.WithName)
105: 		switch {
106: 		case projectIdEmpty && projectNameEmpty:
107: 			return nil, nil, nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "using name but both project ID and project name are empty")
108: 		case !projectIdEmpty && !projectNameEmpty:
109: 			return nil, nil, nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "using name but both project ID and project name are set")
110: 		case !projectIdEmpty:
111: 			where, whereArgs = append(where, "project_id = ?"), append(whereArgs, opts.WithProjectId)
112: 		case !projectNameEmpty:
113: 			where, whereArgs = append(where, "project_id = (select public_id from iam_scope where lower(name) = lower(?))"), append(whereArgs, opts.WithProjectName)
114: 		default:
115: 			return nil, nil, nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "unknown combination of parameters")
116: 		}
117: 	} else {
118: 		switch {
119: 		case !projectIdEmpty:
120: 			return nil, nil, nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "passed in project ID when using target ID for lookup")
121: 		case !projectNameEmpty:
122: 			return nil, nil, nil, errors.New(ctx, errors.InvalidParameter, op, "passed in project name when using target ID for lookup")
123: 		}
124: 	}

126: 	target := allocTargetView()
127: 	target.PublicId = publicIdOrName
128: 	var hostSources []HostSource
129: 	var credSources []CredentialSource
130: 	_, err := r.writer.DoTx(
131: 		ctx,
132: 		db.StdRetryCnt,
133: 		db.ExpBackoff{},

135: 			var lookupErr error
136: 			switch where {

142: 			}
143: 			if lookupErr != nil {

145: 			}
146: 			var err error
147: 			if hostSources, err = fetchHostSources(ctx, read, target.PublicId); err != nil {
148: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
149: 			}
150: 			if credSources, err = fetchCredentialSources(ctx, read, target.PublicId); err != nil {
151: 				return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
152: 			}
153: 			return nil
154: 		},
155: 	)
156: 	if err != nil {
157: 		if errors.IsNotFoundError(err) {
158: 			return nil, nil, nil, nil
159: 		}
160: 		return nil, nil, nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
161: 	}
162: 	subtype, err := target.targetSubtype(ctx)
163: 	if err != nil {
164: 		return nil, nil, nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op)
165: 	}
166: 	return subtype, hostSources, credSources, nil

257: func (r *Repository) listPermissionWhereClauses() ([]string, []interface{}) {
258: 	var where []string
259: 	var args []interface{}
260: 
261: 	inClauseCnt := 0
262: 	for _, p := range r.permissions {
263: 		if p.Action != action.List {
264: 			continue
265: 		}
266: 		inClauseCnt++
267: 
268: 		var clauses []string
269: 		clauses = append(clauses, fmt.Sprintf("project_id = @project_id_%d", inClauseCnt))
270: 		args = append(args, sql.Named(fmt.Sprintf("project_id_%d", inClauseCnt), p.ScopeId))
271: 
272: 		if len(p.ResourceIds) > 0 {
273: 			clauses = append(clauses, fmt.Sprintf("public_id = any(@public_id_%d)", inClauseCnt))
274: 			args = append(args, sql.Named(fmt.Sprintf("public_id_%d", inClauseCnt), "{"+strings.Join(p.ResourceIds, ",")+"}"))
275: 		}
276: 
277: 		where = append(where, fmt.Sprintf("(%s)", strings.Join(clauses, " and ")))
278: 	}
279: 
280: 	return where, args

625: func (s Service) authResult(ctx context.Context, id string, a action.Type) auth.VerifyResults {
626: 	res := auth.VerifyResults{}
627: 	repo, err := s.repoFn()
628: 	if err != nil {
629: 		res.Error = err
630: 		return res
631: 	}
632: 
633: 	var parentId string
634: 	opts := []auth.Option{auth.WithType(resource.Worker), auth.WithAction(a)}
635: 	switch a {
636: 	case action.List, action.CreateWorkerLed, action.CreateControllerLed:
637: 		parentId = id
638: 	default:
639: 		w, err := repo.LookupWorker(ctx, id)
640: 		if err != nil {
641: 			res.Error = err
642: 			return res
643: 		}
644: 		if w == nil {
645: 			res.Error = handlers.NotFoundError()
646: 			return res
647: 		}
648: 		parentId = w.GetScopeId()
649: 		opts = append(opts, auth.WithId(id))
650: 	}
651: 	opts = append(opts, auth.WithScopeId(parentId))
652: 	return auth.Verify(ctx, opts...)
653: }

664: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.IdField) {
665: 		out.Id = in.GetPublicId()
666: 	}
667: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.ScopeIdField) {
668: 		out.ScopeId = in.GetScopeId()
669: 	}
670: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.DescriptionField) && in.GetDescription() != "" {
671: 		out.Description = wrapperspb.String(in.GetDescription())
672: 	}
673: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.NameField) && in.GetName() != "" {
674: 		out.Name = wrapperspb.String(in.GetName())
675: 	}

678: 	}

680: 		out.UpdatedTime = in.GetUpdateTime().GetTimestamp()
681: 	}
682: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.VersionField) {
683: 		out.Version = in.GetVersion()
684: 	}
685: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.ScopeField) {
686: 		out.Scope = opts.WithScope
687: 	}
688: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.AuthorizedActionsField) {
689: 		out.AuthorizedActions = opts.WithAuthorizedActions
690: 		if in.Type == KmsWorkerType && out.AuthorizedActions != nil {
691: 			// KMS workers cannot be updated through the API
692: 			allActions := out.AuthorizedActions
693: 			out.AuthorizedActions = make([]string, 0, len(allActions))

699: 		}
700: 	}
701: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.AddressField) && in.GetAddress() != "" {

703: 	}
704: 	if outputFields.Has(globals.TypeField) && in.GetType() != "" {

706: 	}

719: 		if err != nil {
720: 			return nil, errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op, errors.WithMsg("error preparing config tags proto"))

722: 	}

741: func tagsToMapProto(in map[string][]string) (map[string]*structpb.ListValue, error) {
742: 	b := make(map[string][]interface{})
743: 	for k, v := range in {
744: 		result := make([]interface{}, 0, len(v))
745: 		for _, t := range v {
746: 			result = append(result, t)
747: 		}
748: 		b[k] = result
749: 	}
750: 	ret := make(map[string]*structpb.ListValue)
751: 	var err error
752: 	for k, v := range b {
753: 		ret[k], err = structpb.NewList(v)
754: 		if err != nil {
755: 			return nil, err
756: 		}
757: 	}
758: 	return ret, nil
759: }

33: // NewRepository creates a new server Repository. Supports the options: WithLimit

178: 		if (authResults.Error == handlers.ForbiddenError() || authResults.Error == handlers.UnauthenticatedError()) &&
179: 			req.GetRecursive() &&
180: 			authResults.AuthenticationFinished {
181: 		} else {
182: 			return nil, authResults.Error
183: 		}
184: 	}
185: 
186: 	var err error
187: 	var authzScopes map[string]*scopes.ScopeInfo
188: 	if req.GetRecursive() {
189: 		authzScopes, err = authResults.ScopesAuthorizedForList(ctx, req.GetScopeId(), resource.Target)
190: 	} else {
191: 		authzScopes = map[string]*scopes.ScopeInfo{authResults.Scope.Id: authResults.Scope}
192: 	}
193: 	if err != nil {
194: 		return nil, err
195: 	}
196: 
197: 	// Get all user permissions for the requested scope(s).
198: 	userPerms := authResults.ACL().ListPermissions(authzScopes, resource.Target, IdActions)
199: 	if len(userPerms) == 0 {
200: 		return &pbs.ListTargetsResponse{}, nil
201: 	}
202: 
203: 	tl, err := s.listFromRepo(ctx, userPerms)
204: 	if err != nil {
205: 		return nil, err
206: 	}
207: 	if len(tl) == 0 {
208: 		return &pbs.ListTargetsResponse{}, nil
209: 	}
210: 
211: 	filter, err := handlers.NewFilter(req.GetFilter())
212: 	if err != nil {
213: 		return nil, err
214: 	}
215: 
216: 	finalItems := make([]*pb.Target, 0, len(tl))
217: 	for _, item := range tl {
218: 		pr := perms.Resource{Id: item.GetPublicId(), ScopeId: item.GetProjectId(), Type: resource.Target}
219: 		outputFields := authResults.FetchOutputFields(pr, action.List).SelfOrDefaults(authResults.UserId)
220: 
221: 		outputOpts := make([]handlers.Option, 0, 3)
222: 		outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithOutputFields(&outputFields))
223: 
224: 		if outputFields.Has(globals.ScopeField) {
225: 			outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithScope(authzScopes[item.GetProjectId()]))
226: 		}
227: 		if outputFields.Has(globals.AuthorizedActionsField) {
228: 			authorizedActions := authResults.FetchActionSetForId(ctx, item.GetPublicId(), IdActions, auth.WithResource(&pr)).Strings()
229: 			outputOpts = append(outputOpts, handlers.WithAuthorizedActions(authorizedActions))
230: 		}
231: 
232: 		item, err := toProto(ctx, item, nil, nil, outputOpts...)
233: 		if err != nil {
234: 			return nil, err
235: 		}
236: 
237: 		filterable, err := subtypes.Filterable(item)
238: 		if err != nil {
239: 			return nil, err
240: 		}
241: 		if filter.Match(filterable) {
242: 			finalItems = append(finalItems, item)
243: 		}
244: 	}
245: 
246: 	return &pbs.ListTargetsResponse{Items: finalItems}, nil
247: }

744: 	if err := validateAuthorizeSessionRequest(req); err != nil {
745: 		return nil, err

748: 		target.WithName(req.GetName()),

750: 		target.WithProjectName(req.GetScopeName()),
751: 	)
752: 	if authResults.Error != nil {
753: 		return nil, authResults.Error
754: 	}
755: 
756: 	if authResults.RoundTripValue == nil {
757: 		return nil, stderrors.New("authorize session: expected to get a target back from auth results")
758: 	}
759: 	t, ok := authResults.RoundTripValue.(target.Target)
760: 	if !ok {

767: 	// This could happen if, say, u_recovery was used or u_anon was granted. But
768: 	// don't allow it. It's one thing if grants give access to resources within
769: 	// Boundary, even if those could eventually be used to provide an unintended
770: 	// user access to a remote system. It's quite another to enable anonymous
771: 	// access directly to a remote system.
772: 	//
773: 	// Note that even if u_anon or u_auth are given grants we can still validate
774: 	// a token! So this is just checking that a valid token was provided. The
775: 	// actual reality of this works out to excluding:
776: 	//
777: 	// * True anonymous access (no token provided and u_anon)

832: 	if len(selectedWorkers) == 0 {

916: 	for _, extraFilter := range ExtraWorkerFilters {

928: 	var vaultReqs []credential.Request

948: 	sessionComposition := session.ComposedOf{

976: 	var dynamic []credential.Dynamic

978: 	if len(vaultReqs) > 0 {

989: 	if len(staticIds) > 0 {

995: 		// Remove duplicate requests

1002: 		staticCredsById = make(map[string]credential.Static)
1003: 		for _, c := range creds {
